changes: Added description/title based course-area profiler for circuits, computing, signals, communications, systems/control, labs/projects, math, physics, chem/bio, humanities/business.
Added dynamic student strength/weakness profile from completed courses only; no future outcome leakage.
Changed passed-vs-failed handling: passed courses are excluded; F-level courses are eligible for retake; weak passes become weakness signals but are not auto-repeated.
Recommendation ranking now uses expected grade, success probability, expected difficulty, student area average, subject average, target GPA gap, workload tolerance, and academic risk.
Electives are allowed to help GPA only when they count toward the plan, and are prioritized from stronger student areas when GPA protection is the goal.
Added GPA feasibility calculator for semester target and best possible one-semester cumulative improvement under AUB 4.0 GPA cap.
Added course_profile_note, course_area_label, student_area_avg, student_weak_area, student_strong_area to recommendation outputs.
Updated UI cards to show expected grade, expected fit, success, expected difficulty, and course area.
important_limitation: No real student outcome data is available; models are validated on synthetic outcomes with real catalogue/planning structure. Claims should be framed as ML-assisted prototype, not proven AUB deployment.

model4_success_metrics.json.split: student-level GroupShuffleSplit to avoid same-student leakage

model5_expected_grade_metrics.json.target: expected course grade points out of 4.3 using pre-attempt features only; cumulative GPA remains capped at 4.0
model5_expected_grade_metrics.json.split: student-level GroupShuffleSplit to avoid same-student leakage
